summary: Comprehensive testing completed for Brazilian World Cup themed birthday invitation app. All major features working correctly including sealed state, open animation, story card display, RSVP flows, admin functionality, and individual invite links.

ui_bugs.issue: Cancel RSVP flow has minor issue with button state after confirmation

passed_tests: Sealed state display with dark festive theme
Gift emoji and Abrir convite button
Date pill display (13 de Junho de 2026)
Open animation transition to story card
Story card hero section with VOCÊ FOI CONVIDADO text
Anderson (24 anos) and Arthur (23 anos) with emoji avatars
Stadium background with date (13/06/2026) and time (15h00)
Info stickers (Traje, Energia de torcida, Bebidas) with dark glass morphism
Address section with Google Maps link
CTA bar with Confirmar presença and cancel buttons
RSVP confirm modal with Brazil ribbon
RSVP via individual link with pre-filled name
Admin settings page with all configuration fields
Settings save functionality with success message

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (1 minor UI issue with cancel flow)
